mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_distill (user_id, speak_style, character_label, love_style, values_view, taboo, distill_status, process_status, model_version) VALUES (#{userId}, #{speakStyle}, #{characterLabel}, #{loveStyle}, #{valuesView}, #{taboo}, #{distillStatus}, #{processStatus}, #{modelVersion}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE speak_style = VALUES(speak_style), character_label = VALUES(character_label), love_style = VALUES(love_style), values_view = VALUES(values_view), taboo = VALUES(taboo), distill_status = VALUES(distill_status), process_status = VALUES(process_status), model_version = VALUES(model_version)
